candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; fallback only.
Not revenue; candidate does not match concept.

variables.notes: Used priority list for revenue label changes; preferred the non-total row 'Revenue' over duplicate subtotal 'Total Revenue'.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label; preferred over duplicate/ balancing rows.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods Sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row should not be preferred when direct COGS exists.

variables.notes: Selected direct COGS row and excluded duplicate/balancing alternatives.

candidates.why: Core SG&A component; operating overhead.
Subcomponent of selling expenses; less preferred when parent line exists.
Core SG&A component; operating overhead.
Subcomponent of administrative expenses; less preferred when parent line exists.
Overhead bucket; acceptable SG&A-type component excluding finance/tax items.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview; per rules include it plus overhead buckets for coverage.

variables.notes: Applied SG&A rule (b): explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' row exists but is mostly empty in preview, so included it plus populated overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded '- Other' subcomponents to avoid duplicating the parent lines.
No R&D-related row is present on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance-expense line; usable fallback if no direct interest-expense line is available.
Most direct recurring interest-expense line in the statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component only; narrower than total interest expense.
Finance expense but not specifically interest.
Semantically ideal label if reported in some years despite empty preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component; not preferred for main interest expense.

variables.notes: Used priority list rather than summing. Preferred explicit interest-expense labels first; included broad 'Financial expenses' only as fallback.

candidates.why: Matches equity concept but includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent-owner equity exists.
Does not match book equity; total balance sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Tangible assets

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the better owner/parent equity line needed to exclude non-controlling interests. Chose exact row label from the sheet outside candidates. Manual review recommended because the label has unusual appended text ('Tangible assets') but values align with parent equity and reconcile with Total equity plus Non-controlling interests. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Tangible assets

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred.
Duplicate balance-sheet minority-interest label; fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI lines only, with 'Non-controlling interests' preferred over duplicate synonym 'Minority Interest'.
